Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.commons.concurrent.NullableReference

Packages that use NullableReference
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.concurrent
Concurrent programming utilities including locks and synchronization primitives.

  • Uses of NullableReference in org.apache.juneau.commons.concurrent

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.concurrent that return NullableReference
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <V> NullableReference<V>
    NullableReference.empty()
    Creates an empty NullableReference with an initial value of null.
    NullableReference<V>
    NullableReference.filter(Predicate<? super V> predicate)
    If a value is present, and the value matches the given predicate, returns an NullableReference describing the value, otherwise returns an empty NullableReference.
    <U> NullableReference<U>
    NullableReference.flatMap(Function<? super V,? extends NullableReference<? extends U>> mapper)
    If a value is present, returns the result of applying the given NullableReference-bearing mapping function to the value, otherwise returns an empty NullableReference.
    <U> NullableReference<U>
    NullableReference.map(Function<? super V,? extends U> mapper)
    If a value is present, applies the provided mapping function to it and returns an NullableReference describing the result.
    static <V> NullableReference<V>
    NullableReference.of(V initialValue)
    Creates an NullableReference with the specified initial value.
    static <V> NullableReference<V>
    NullableReference.ofNullable(V initialValue)
    Creates an NullableReference with the specified initial value (alias for of(Object)).
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.commons.concurrent with type arguments of type NullableReference
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <U> NullableReference<U>
    NullableReference.flatMap(Function<? super V,? extends NullableReference<? extends U>> mapper)
    If a value is present, returns the result of applying the given NullableReference-bearing mapping function to the value, otherwise returns an empty NullableReference.
